name: Vietnam International Food Industry Exhibition 2026 (Vietnam Foodexpo)
description: Vietnam International Food Industry Exhibition 2026 (Vietnam Foodexpo) is an important annual trade promotion event hosted by the Ministry of Industry and Trade. Taking place in the city. Ho Chi Minh City, the exhibition is an effective bridge for Vietnamese agricultural and food businesses with the domestic distribution system and international importers, to develop markets and promote exports.

name: Saigontourist Group 2026 Culinary Culture and Delicious Food Festival
description: Saigontourist Group 2026 Culinary Culture and Delicious Food Festival

name: The 5th Ho Chi Minh City International Food Industry Exhibition in 2026
description: The 5th Ho Chi Minh City International Food Industry Exhibition (FOODEX 2026) brings together about 450 booths from domestic and foreign businesses. The event is an important trade bridge to introduce advanced technology, promote Vietnamese cuisine and promote international trade connections.

name: 9th TOKYU Group Japan Festival 2026
description: The 9th TOKYU Group Japan Festival with the theme "Kawaii Japan" is expected to take place in mid-March 2026 in Ho Chi Minh City. The event brings a unique cultural space with Bon Odori group dance activities, a rich food court and a vibrant Cosplay contest for young people.

name: Great celebration of the 45th anniversary of the establishment of the Vietnam Buddhist Sangha
description: The Vietnam Buddhist Sangha plans to hold a grand celebration celebrating its 45th anniversary on November 6, 2026 in the city. Ho Chi Minh. With the theme of developing with the country in a new era, the event includes activities such as scientific seminars, exhibitions and traditional ceremonies. This is an important milestone evaluating achievements and orienting the vision to 2045.

name: Exhibition "Intermission - This place... that place"
description: Personal exhibition "Intermission - This place... that place" by artist Hoang Long Hai opens on March 12, 2026 in Ho Chi Minh City. With 11 oil paintings, the author leads viewers to explore a world of memories and nostalgic silence. The art space depicts lonely images in a state of contemplation, blending reality and dreams.

name: The 12th Ho Chi Minh City Ao Dai Festival in 2026
description: The 12th Ho Chi Minh City Ao Dai Festival 2026 with the theme "Golden Silk Thread - Weaving Desire" takes place from February 24 to the end of March 2026 at many locations in the city. Key events such as the opening ceremony (March 6) and art night (March 7) will be held at Nguyen Hue Walking Street. The festival aims to honor and spread the beauty of traditional ao dai.

name: Exhibition "Homeland through the lens of female photographers in HCMC"
description: The 13th photo exhibition "Homeland through the lens of female photographers in Ho Chi Minh City" displays 165 works by 55 female photographers. The event introduces the city's natural beauty, daily life and vibrant atmosphere on the occasion of International Women's Day on March 8. The exhibition takes place at the headquarters of the Ho Chi Minh City Photography Association until March 11, 2026.

name: VIFA EXPO 2026
description: VIFA EXPO 2026 is a large-scale international export fair of wooden furniture and fine arts in Vietnam, scheduled to take place from March 8 to 11, 2026. The event was held simultaneously at WTC EXPO and SKY EXPO (HCMC) with more than 2,800 booths. This is an important platform to help interior and exterior businesses connect directly with international buyers.

name: Thematic exhibition "Special solidarity and friendship between Vietnam - Laos - Cambodia"
description: The theme displays more than 150 documents and artifacts recreating the history of close ties between the three countries of Vietnam, Laos and Cambodia. The activity aims to celebrate the 75th anniversary of the founding of the United Front of the Alliance between the three nations and the 46th anniversary of the death of President Ton Duc Thang. This is a valuable traditional educational space of friendship for the young generation and international students.

name: Vietnamese Tet Binh Ngo Festival 2026
description: Vietnamese Tet Binh Ngo Festival 2026 takes place from February 1 to February 21, 2026 at Ho Chi Minh City Youth Cultural House. With the theme "Old beauty in today's radiance", this 19th event recreates the traditional Tet space combined with contemporary art activities. Key highlights include Ong Do Street for Letters, Apricot Blossom Street, installation exhibitions, ethnic art performances and startup product display areas.

name: Can Gio Spring Festival
description: Can Gio Spring Festival 2026 takes place from February 7 to February 28 at Vinhomes Green Paradise urban area, Can Gio, Ho Chi Minh City. The event is held with a series of unique "festivals within a festival", including the spring flower festival, hot air balloon festival and three-region cuisine. The highlights that attract tourists are a hundred-year-old apricot tree, hundreds of peach trees and 22 giant hot air balloons.

name: Spring flower market On the wharf under the boat
description: Spring flower market "On the wharf under the boat" is a unique traditional cultural event at Binh Dong Wharf, Ho Chi Minh City, recreating the Tet space of the river region. With a history of nearly 50 years, the event brings together hundreds of boats from the Western provinces carrying flowers and specialties to serve people. This year, the flower market has more than 500 business locations, along with many cultural activities such as Ong Do Street, cuisine and digital technology applications.

name: Book Street Festival of the Year of the Horse 2026
description: The 2026 Binh Ngo Tet Book Street Festival with the theme "Spring gathers - Steadfastly reaching out" is a cultural meeting at the beginning of the year in Ho Chi Minh City, taking place from February 15 to February 22, 2026 (ie December 28 to the 6th of Tet). The event was expanded to three locations, bringing a variety of activities such as rare book exhibitions, Spring newspapers and introducing the Ho Chi Minh Cultural Space to spread reading culture.

name: Binh Dong Tet Flower Market - Spring of the Horse 2026
description: Binh Dong Tet Flower Market - Spring Binh Ngo 2026 takes place in Binh Dong ward, Ho Chi Minh City, recreating the typical "on the dock under the boat" cultural space. With more than 500 stalls from gardeners, the flower market displays a variety of ornamental flowers and agricultural products. The event also has many unique cultural activities such as Ong Do Street, Tet cake wrapping experience and art performances.

name: Suoi Tien Spring Festival 2026
description: Suoi Tien Spring Festival 2026 with the theme "Vietnamese New Year - Hundred Years of Memories" brings a colorful Tet cultural space through four stages from origin to modernity. The event featured a real-life show of Son Tinh Thuy Tinh, folk art activities and a series of new technology games. This is an ideal destination for families and international tourists to experience Vietnamese identity.

name: Festival season at Hotel Indigo Saigon The City
description: Hotel Indigo Saigon The City organizes a series of year-end festive events with art party packages and unique culinary menus. The event space is delicately designed, combining Saigon heritage and contemporary style through exclusive decorative themes. This is an opportunity for individuals and businesses to organize meetings and gratitude in a luxurious space.

name: The 46th Ho Chi Minh City Spring Flower Festival - Spring of the Horse 2026
description: The 46th Ho Chi Minh City Spring Flower Festival with the theme "The colors of the horse welcome spring" took place at Tao Dan park on an area of ​​9.6 hectares. The event brings together many valuable bonsai trees along with brilliant landscapes and a series of unique cultural, folk art and culinary activities. This is a traditional spring travel space serving residents and tourists from December 25 to the 6th of Tet.

name: Spring Festival 2026 in Ho Chi Minh City
description: Ho Chi Minh City organizes a series of events to celebrate the 2026 Year of the Horse with many unique cultural activities. Highlights are the Spring Flower Festival at Tao Dan Park with the theme "The colors of the horse welcome spring", the Spring Flower Market "On the wharf under the boat" and Tet flower markets in many large parks. The events imbue the traditional Tet atmosphere with art performances, cuisine and folk games.

name: Vietnam International Exhibition of Textile Industry and Textile Technology (VIATT 2026)
description: Vietnam International Exhibition of Textile Industry and Textile Technology (VIATT 2026) will take place from February 26-28, 2026 at Saigon Exhibition and Convention Center (SECC), Ho Chi Minh City. The event is organized by the Ministry of Industry and Trade and Messe Frankfurt Group (Germany), expected to gather more than 450 businesses with nearly 1,000 booths. This is an opportunity for businesses in the textile industry to connect, introduce new technology and promote sustainable development.

name: The 11th Vietnam - Japan Festival
description: The 11th Vietnam - Japan Festival in 2026 takes place at September 23 Park with the theme "Hold hands together - Children - Earth - Future". The event includes many unique activities such as cultural and artistic exchanges, cuisine, seminars and creative competitions. This is a large-scale annual activity aimed at tightening the strategic partnership between Vietnam and Japan.

name: Full Moon Festival in January 2026
description: The 2026 January Full Moon Festival in Thu Dau Mot ward is organized according to the "free festival" model with a large scale and methodical security work. The event peaks on March 2 and 3 (January 14 and 15) with the highlight being the Ba Thien Hau procession. Visitors are supported with many free services such as meals, drinks and motorbike taxis to pick up the elderly and children.

name: Cultural and Tourism Festival Opening Program in 2026
description: The 2026 Cultural - Tourism Festival Opening Program, organized by Ho Chi Minh City, will take place in Vung Tau from February 21 to March 1, 2026. The event has many special activities such as the Cannon Opening Ceremony, food festival at Thuy Van Park and marine sports. This is an opportunity to promote the image, culture and tourist destinations of the city.

name: The 4th Saigon Lacquer Exhibition in 2026
description: The 4th Saigon Lacquer Exhibition officially opened at Ho Chi Minh City University of Fine Arts, marking the return of a professional art activity after many years of hiatus. The event introduces 92 paintings and statues from 91 artists, honoring traditional lacquer processing techniques and the creative sublimation of many generations of artists.

name: Festival "Spring cohesion - Tet of love"
description: The festival "Spring cohesion - Tet of gratitude" in Tan Dinh ward is an annual cultural activity to create a joyful atmosphere and take care of social security during the traditional Tet holiday. The event took place with activities such as amateur music, boi singing, banh chung wrapping contest and folk games. This is an opportunity for localities to connect with the community and support families in difficult circumstances.

name: Nguyen Tieu Festival at Cho Lon
description: The Nguyen Tieu Festival in the Cho Lon area takes place on the full moon afternoon of January with the participation of about 1,000 actors from Chinese assembly halls. The event includes artistic parades, prayers for peace, fortune and unique folk cultural performances. This is an opportunity for residents and tourists to experience the traditional colorful festival atmosphere in Ho Chi Minh City.

name: Spring flower festival in Vung Tau ward in 2026
description: The 2026 Binh Ngo Tet Book Street Festival and Vung Tau Ward Spring Flower Festival officially opened from February 15 to February 22 (ie December 28 to the 6th of Tet). The event offers more than 80 cultural experience activities, thematic exhibitions and unique stage shows. The festival space combines reading culture and displaying spring artifacts, serving the sightseeing needs of people.

name: Art Exhibition "Spring City"
description: The exhibition "Spring City" displays 206 works by 180 artists at the Ho Chi Minh City Fine Arts Museum. The event introduces a variety of genres from painting, sculpture to graphics, notably with the horse mascot to welcome the new year of the Horse 2026. This is a large-scale annual activity to spread the Tet atmosphere and optimism to the public.

name: Spring Flower Fair and Spring Solidarity Festival - Tet of Gratitude
description: An Nhon Ward, Ho Chi Minh City organized a series of activities such as the Spring Flower Fair and the Spring Solidarity Festival - Tet of Gratitude to celebrate the new year of the Horse 2026. The event was exciting with contests on cooking Chung cake, decorating spring landscapes and many special sports and cultural activities. On this occasion, the locality also donated hundreds of Tet gifts to take care of families in difficult circumstances.

name: Spring 2026 newspaper cover exhibition
description: The exhibition space introduces unique Tet newspaper publications elaborately invested in by many press agencies. Activities take place at Ho Chi Minh City Book Street throughout the Lunar New Year holiday to serve readers and tourists. In particular, revenue from newspaper sales here will be contributed to support journalists in difficult circumstances.

name: Nguyen Tieu Festival
description: Nguyen Tieu Festival

name: Ba Thien Hau's procession
description: Ba Thien Hau's procession takes place on March 3, 2026 (full moon day of the first lunar month) in Thu Dau Mot, considered the largest folk festival in the region. The event stands out with a solemn parade and many volunteer activities such as distributing free water and food. This is an opportunity for residents and visitors to pray for peace and connect the community.

name: Funeral ceremonies at Nhi Phu Assembly Hall (Ong Bon Pagoda)
description: Within the framework of the January Full Moon Festival series in Cho Lon, Nhi Phu Assembly Hall (Ong Bon Pagoda) organizes many traditional worship rituals. The event takes place alongside major festivals such as Ky Yen and Nghinh Ong Quan Thanh De Quan. The highlight of the series of activities is the Nguyen Tieu festival with a large-scale street parade gathering about 1,200 actors and artisans.

name: Opening ceremony at Mr. and Mrs. Chieu's Mausoleum
description: The opening ceremony takes place on January 7 at Ong Ba Chieu's Mausoleum to perform the lowering ceremony, officially closing the Tet holiday. The event was held according to Nguyen Dynasty royal ceremonies to honor Left Army Le Van Duyet. This is an opportunity for people to pray for peace and start labor and production activities for the new year.

name: Exhibition Intersection of Time
description: Exhibition Intersection of Time

name: Nguyen Hue Flower Street 2026
description: Nguyen Hue Flower Street Spring Binh Ngo 2026 stands out with an 11m high horse mascot inspired by the image of Saint Giong. The event for the first time applied 3D Mapping technology, augmented reality (AR) and modern lighting system to bring a multi-layered emotional experience. The grand scenes delicately combine traditional lacquer materials and advanced decorative techniques.

name: Art exhibition "Two parallel lines - One destination"
description: The exhibition displays more than 70 works by the artist couple Phan Oanh and Dang Thi Duong at the Ho Chi Minh City Fine Arts Association. Phan Oanh introduced paintings on war themes with quiet colors, while Dang Thi Duong brought innocent nuances through a series of compositions about memories and rivers.

name: Exhibition "Seven or Eight Years"
description: The exhibition "Seven or Eight Years" by artist Bui Chat is a special art project, displaying 29 acrylic works that will automatically fade and disappear completely after 7-8 years. The event took place from February 4 to 28 at Con Art Gallery, Ho Chi Minh City, raising questions about existence and finitude in art.

name: Holi Festival
description: Holi Festival 2026 takes place in Ho Chi Minh City with the theme of community connection and cultural harmony. The event attracted more than 500 guests with traditional colored powder throwing activities, art performances and introduction of Indian cuisine. This is an opportunity for the international community to exchange and learn about the beauty of South Asian culture.

name: Harvest Festival
description: The Harvest Festival of the San Chay ethnic group in Phu Giao commune takes place on the morning of February 22 (the 6th day of Tet). The event includes incense offering ceremonies, a solemn tree procession, and a lively festival with bamboo dances and folk games such as stick pushing, tug of war, and shuttlecock throwing.

name: Green Living Festival - Spring Binh Ngo 2026
description: Green Living Festival - Spring Binh Ngo 2026 with the theme "Spring and Youth" takes place at Gia Dinh Park, Ho Chi Minh City. The event was organized by the Ho Chi Minh City Youth Union to spread a green, healthy lifestyle and take care of Tet to the community. The festival has hundreds of stalls for vegetarian cuisine, green products, OCOP products, along with cultural activities such as Ong Do street and folk games.

name: Thu Duc Tet Fest - Vietnamese Tet Festival 2026
description: Thu Duc Tet Fest 2026 takes place in Thu Duc ward, Ho Chi Minh City from January 25 to February 8, 2026 with 9 unique experience spaces. The event recreates the beauty of traditional Tet through activities such as Ong Do Street, folk games, cuisine and ao dai contest. This is an opportunity to connect traditional culture and at the same time carry out social security activities for the community.

name: Fair to promote trade and stimulate consumption to celebrate the Spring of the Horse in 2026
description: The trade promotion and consumer demand promotion fair to celebrate the 2026 Spring Festival takes place in Trung My Tay ward, Ho Chi Minh City. With about 100 booths, the event has commercial areas, OCOP products, Tet specialties and children's play areas, to meet the shopping and entertainment needs of people at the end of the year.

name: The 23rd Vietnam International Trade Fair (VIETNAM EXPO 2025 HCMC)
description: The 23rd Vietnam International Trade Fair (VIETNAM EXPO 2025 HCMC) will take place from December 4-6, 2025 at SECC Center, Ho Chi Minh City. With the theme "Solutions for modern life", the event brings together more than 1,000 booths from 20 countries, displaying advanced products and technology in fields such as food, smart consumption, supporting industry, and home decoration.

name: The 19th Ho Chi Minh City International Tourism Fair 2025 (ITE HCMC 2025)
description: The 19th International Tourism Fair Ho Chi Minh City (ITE HCMC) 2025 takes place from September 4 to 6 at SECC with the theme "Sustainable Tourism - Vivid Experience". The event attracted more than 500 exhibitors and hundreds of international buyers to promote Vietnam tourism. This is an important platform to help travel businesses connect, cooperate and update the latest market trends.

name: Spring Newspaper Exhibition advances into the digital age
description: The exhibition "Spring Newspaper advances in the digital age" takes place from January 28 to February 1, 2026 at City Book Street. Ho Chi Minh. The event showcases the development journey of Xuan Vietnam newspaper through the ages, from digitized 19th century publications to contemporary products. The exhibition aims to honor the value of journalistic culture and serve as a bridge to help young readers access this heritage in the digital era.

name: Exhibition "Silk is"
description: The exhibition "Silk is" displays contemporary silk paintings by artist Bui Tien Tuan in a space curated by designer Quach Thai Cong. The event explores a woman's inner world through delicate colors and flexible lines. The exhibition takes place at Thai Cong Art Gallery, Ho Chi Minh City and is expected to last until December 11, 2025.

name: International exhibition of techniques, fire protection and rescue equipment, and security and safety equipment in 2025
description: The international exhibition on techniques, firefighting equipment, rescue equipment and security equipment (Secutech Vietnam 2025) will take place in Ho Chi Minh City from August 14 to 16, 2025. The event brings together more than 480 brands, displaying advanced technology solutions and modern safety and protection equipment. Visitors have the opportunity to experience practicing escape, firefighting and first aid skills under the guidance of specialized forces.

name: Pho Day Festival 2025
description: The 2025 Pho Day Festival takes place in Ho Chi Minh City with the participation of 30 famous pho brands from all regions. The event is expected to welcome about 100,000 visitors and serve tens of thousands of meals at reasonable prices. The organizing committee will spend part of the revenue from pho sales to support people damaged by storms and floods.

name: Trade Promotion Fair for Cooperatives (Cooperatives) in the Southern region in 2025
description: The 2025 Trade Promotion Fair for Cooperatives in the Southern Region will take place from November 18-23, 2025 in Ba Ria. Organized by the Vietnam Cooperative Alliance, the event gathered 250 booths displaying typical products and OCOP from many provinces and cities. This is an opportunity for cooperatives to connect with large distribution systems, expand markets and promote their brands.

name: Nghinh Ong Can Gio Festival
description: Nghinh Ong Can Gio Festival 2025 takes place from October 5 to October 6 in Can Gio district, Ho Chi Minh City, coinciding with the traditional Mid-Autumn Festival. This is a national intangible cultural heritage with rituals of processioning Nghinh at sea, worshiping at Ong Thuy Tuong's Mausoleum and releasing flower lanterns to pay tribute to ancestors. The event honors the belief of worshiping Ong fish, praying for good weather and strengthening the solidarity of the fishing community.

name: Festive Arctic Adventure festival season
description: Le Méridien Saigon organizes the Festive Arctic Adventure season with Arctic-themed culinary and entertainment activities. The highlight is the Advent Calendar program that offers more than 2,400 valuable gifts, including resort vouchers at the global Marriott system. Participating guests can receive gifts via fanpage or draw directly at the hotel throughout December.

name: Hozo City Tet Fest 2025
description: Hozo City Tet Fest 2025 is a combined event between Hozo International Music Festival and City Tet Fest cultural festival, taking place from December 27 to December 31, 2025 at Saigon Riverfront Park, Ho Chi Minh City. The event brings a variety of activities from music, art, cuisine to community experiences, with the highlight being the New Year's Countdown music night and a culinary space with the participation of Michelin restaurants.

name: Vietbuild Home 2025 international exhibition
description: Vietbuild Home 2025 international exhibition takes place in Ho Chi Minh City, gathering more than 200 businesses with about 700 booths. The event focuses on displaying products on interior and exterior decoration, construction materials, and smart home solutions, to stimulate year-end shopping and create trade promotion opportunities for businesses.

name: Food Festival - Ca Mau Crab Festival 2025
description: Cuisine Festival - Ca Mau Crab Festival 2025 is a prominent activity in the series of events "Hello Ca Mau", taking place for the first time in the city. Ho Chi Minh. The event was held at the Youth Cultural House with a scale of 100 booths, introducing Ca Mau crab specialties, OCOP products and special cultural and artistic programs such as amateur music.

name: Exhibition commemorating the 80th anniversary of the Southern Resistance War
description: The exhibition commemorating the 80th anniversary of the Southern Resistance Day opened on the morning of September 23, 2025 at Lam Son Park and surrounding areas. The event displays hundreds of photographic documents about the heroic spirit of Saigon's army and people in 1945. At the same time, the exhibition introduces development achievements and orientations for building a modern government of Ho Chi Minh City.

name: Painting exhibition "Season of Love 3"
description: The painting exhibition "Season of Love 3" took place at the Contemporary Art Space in the city. Ho Chi Minh, gathering works of many artists. The event brings an art space diverse in materials and styles, with the spirit of promoting companionship, connection and sharing instead of individual competition. This is a cultural activity that contributes to enriching the spiritual life of the community.

name: Vietnam International Food Industry Exhibition 2025
description: Vietnam International Food Industry Exhibition 2025 (Vietnam Foodexpo 2025) is an important trade promotion event for the food industry, taking place in the city. Ho Chi Minh. The exhibition is expected to gather more than 350 domestic and international businesses, which is an opportunity to promote products, connect partners and expand markets.

name: UK Summer Festival
description: UK Summer Festival takes place from September 22 to 25, 2025 at Nha Rong Wharf, City. Ho Chi Minh. The event was held to celebrate the 15th anniversary of the Vietnam - UK strategic partnership and welcome the visit of the British Royal Navy ship HMS Richmond. This is an opportunity to strengthen diplomatic, security and trade cooperation between the two countries.

name: Leaf Ornamental Exhibition 2026
description: The 2026 Ornamental Exhibition with the theme "Listening to leaves and flowers telling stories" takes place at the Saigon Zoo and Botanical Garden, introducing many types of ornamental plants and unique works of garden art. The event gathered 19 participating units with more than 50 diverse display booths. Visitors can experience the green space and get free admission to the exhibition area after 5 p.m. every day.

name: Tet of love - Happy ward
description: The program "Tet of gratitude - Happy Ward" takes place on January 31, 2026 at Hoang Van Thu Park, Ho Chi Minh City with many meaningful activities. The event includes walking companionship, giving Tet gifts to people in difficult circumstances and social security activities. The highlight is the cultural and artistic space with Southern characteristics with the Bong Nhi dance performance and traditional musical instrument ensemble.

name: Thematic exhibition of postage stamps "80 years of Vietnam reaching out to the ocean"
description: Thematic exhibition of postage stamps "80 years of Vietnam reaching out to the ocean" takes place from August 27 to September 27, 2025 at the Ho Chi Minh City Museum of History. The event introduces more than 300 stamp samples and many precious memorabilia, recreating important milestones in the journey of building and defending the country. The exhibition is open and free to arouse national pride and promote the stamp collecting movement.

name: Exhibition "In the midst of turmoil, let yourself drift"
description: Artist Le Minh Khoa's first solo exhibition titled "In the midst of turmoil, let yourself drift" introduces 28 acrylic works inspired by nature. The event took place in Ho Chi Minh City, attracting the attention of famous artists and beauties of the 2000s. The works were curated by Ace Le, expressed through abstract language and unique soft sculpture techniques.

name: Photo exhibition Glorious 80 years of the Vietnamese National Assembly
description: The photo exhibition "Glory of 80 years of the Vietnamese National Assembly" will be held in Ho Chi Minh City from August 7 to August 17, 2025. The event displays more than 150 documentary images about the history of the development of the National Assembly and outstanding marks of the City's National Assembly Delegation for the 2021-2026 term. This is a meaningful cultural and political activity to celebrate the 80th anniversary of the first General Election.

name: Exhibition "Body"
description: The exhibition "Sac Than" displays the latest series of oil paintings by artist Dang Van Tu. The author exploits the theme of shape through the technique of applying thick colors, creating a clear, sculptural feeling. This is the event marking the male artist's fourth solo exhibition.

name: The 35th Hai Au Art Photo Exhibition
description: Hai Au Photography Club organized an exhibition to celebrate its 35th anniversary with the theme "Colors of life of Vietnamese peoples". The event displays 100 works of art honoring the beauty of labor and the image of Vietnamese women in everyday life. The exhibition takes place at 2 Ho Chi Minh City Women's Cultural House until October 9, 2025.

name: Exhibition of achievements in journalism and publishing in Ho Chi Minh City
description: The exhibition space displays typical press and publishing publications to celebrate the 1st Ho Chi Minh City Party Congress. The event brings together many publishing units, distribution units and key press agencies, demonstrating the spirit of innovation and desire for development in the era of digital transformation.

name: Cultural and Cuisine Festival 2025
description: The 2025 Cultural and Cuisine Festival officially opened on the evening of December 31 in Ba Diem commune in the atmosphere of welcoming the new year. The event featured the launch of the local brand identity and the application of "Ba Diem 4.0" technology. In addition, the program also promotes welfare activities through raising funds for Study Promotion - Betel Garden Land Talent Promotion.

name: Art exhibition Report on the results of the 2025 new creative and creative camp
description: The exhibition displays works from the 2025 creative camp, highlighting the thinking about space and light of artist Nguyen Trung Hieu. The works demonstrate the fragile intersection between the presence and disappearance of the human form through artistic movements.

name: Art exhibition "Next step"
description: Art exhibition with the theme "Moving on" displays 42 works by 42 artists in Ho Chi Minh City to celebrate the 80th anniversary of National Day September 2. The works use a variety of materials such as oil paint, lacquer, and silk to depict the country's historical journeys and development. This is a key cultural activity honoring the creative spirit and traditions of generations of artists.

name: Exhibition What the skin wants to say
description: The event "What the skin wants to say" is a unique interactive exhibition combining visual arts and technology to honor the value of skin. Visitors have the opportunity to experience a multi-sensory space, receive advice from dermatologists and learn about Lactacyd's new product line. The exhibition journey helps viewers understand the connection between skin health and personal emotions.

name: Rural Industrial Goods Exhibition 2025
description: The 2025 Rural Industrial Goods Exhibition attracts the participation of 25 provinces and cities with 250 booths in Ho Chi Minh City. The event displays many high-quality agricultural - forestry - fishery products, while also introducing circular economy solutions and virtual reality technology. Activities to support rural industrial establishments to improve their competitiveness and develop their brands.

name: Vietnam International Logistics Exhibition 2025
description: Vietnam International Logistics Exhibition 2025 (Vilog) brings together nearly 350 businesses from 20 countries to exhibit in the city. Ho Chi Minh. The event focuses on introducing advanced technologies such as AI, IoT and green logistics solutions to improve the industry's competitiveness. Within the framework of the program, there will also be a series of in-depth seminars on digital transformation and activities connecting international supply and demand.

name: Vietnam Supporting Industrial Products and Electrical Equipment Exhibition 2025
description: Vietnam Supporting Industrial Products and Electrical Equipment Exhibition 2025 has a scale of 250 booths, focusing on the fields of electronic components, renewable energy and innovative solutions. The event includes trade connection activities, seminars on energy transition and display of typical products of Ho Chi Minh City. This is an opportunity for businesses to reach partners and participate deeply in the global value chain.

name: Inauguration ceremony of "Photography Road" and launch of the Contemporary Art Exhibition House
description: On the afternoon of January 25, 2026, Ho Chi Minh City officially inaugurated the "Road of Photography" and launched the Contemporary Art Exhibition House in the Dong Khoi Street area. This public cultural space displays 88 typical photographic works reflecting the city's achievements. This is a meaningful project to celebrate the success of the Party's 14th National Congress.

name: City Automation Festival. Ho Chi Minh in 2025 (VECA 2025)
description: City Automation Festival. Ho Chi Minh 2025 focuses on displaying solutions on IoT, smart control systems and renewable energy. The event includes many activities such as business forums, seminars and international trade promotion. The exhibition takes place alongside VINAMAC EXPO 2025 at SECC with a scale of about 150 booths.

name: Vietnam Mother & Baby Products and Toys Exhibition (IBTE VIETNAM)
description: Vietnam Mother & Baby Products and Toys Exhibition (IBTE VIETNAM) takes place in Ho Chi Minh City with a scale of 11,000 square meters, gathering more than 200 exhibitors. The event is an important meeting point for the regional toy industry, introducing many original IP product lines and promoting international trade cooperation.

name: Press exhibition of 34 provinces and cities
description: The exhibition "Press of 34 provinces and cities" with the theme "Spring Newspaper 2026" opened in Ho Chi Minh City on January 5. The event displays modern press publications of 34 localities along with a valuable collection of antique newspapers over 50 years old. This is a space for exchanges between generations of journalists about preserving the cultural value of Xuan newspaper in the digital age.

name: New Year's Eve celebration and countdown to welcome the new year 2026
description: Vietnam becomes an attractive destination during the year-end festive season with a vibrant atmosphere to welcome Christmas and New Year 2026. Destinations such as Hanoi, Hoi An and Phu Quoc attract tourists thanks to the combination of traditional cultural beauty and modern entertainment activities. This is the ideal time to experience brilliant festive spaces and New Year countdown programs.

name: Photo exhibition "Himalaya: Pure beauty"
description: The photo exhibition "Himalaya: Pure Beauty" introduces the works of Sherpa photographer Lhakpa Sonam Sherpa and "Himalayan storyteller" Nguyen Manh Duy (Pema Tenzin). The event is a journey to discover the majestic beauty, culture and people of the land at the foot of Everest, providing a calming and healing art space. The exhibition is open to the public in Ho Chi Minh City and Hanoi.
